title: Relationship Definition
description: Schema for defining a relationship between two concepts within a user-provided semantic layer.

name.description: The unique name of the relationship.

description.description: A human-readable description of the relationship.

source_concept.description: The name of the source concept for this relationship. Must match the 'name' of a defined concept.

target_concept.description: The name of the target concept for this relationship. Must match the 'name' of a defined concept.

attributes.description: A list of attributes belonging to this relationship itself (e.g., for an associative entity or properties of the link).

source_foreign_key_attribute.description: Optional: The name of the attribute in the source concept that acts as a foreign key linking to the target concept. Useful for relational modeling.

target_foreign_key_attribute.description: Optional: The name of the attribute in the target concept that acts as a foreign key linking to the source concept. Useful for relational modeling.
